columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Extract the value from Table 1, under the "High Volumea" section, in the row for "Darolutamide" (which is the treatment arm). The number of patients is 497. The total number of patients in the Darolutamide arm is 651 (from Figure 1 on page 3). Calculate the percentage as (497 / 651) * 100%.
